A

ACCEPTED - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.WaitingListStatus
The entrant has accepted the invitation.
AdminDevice - Class in com.example.helios.model
Represents a device installation that has been explicitly granted or denied administrator access.
AdminDevice() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.model.AdminDevice
Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
AdminDevice(String, boolean, String, long) - Constructor for class com.example.helios.model.AdminDevice
Constructs a new AdminDevice with the specified details.
AdminEventAdapter - Class in com.example.helios.ui
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events, typically for administrative purposes.
AdminEventAdapter(List<Event>, AdminEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.helios.ui.AdminEventAdapter
Constructs an AdminEventAdapter.
AdminEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener - Interface in com.example.helios.ui
Listener interface for handling event-related click actions.
AdminFragment - Class in com.example.helios.ui.nav
Fragment for administrative tasks, such as managing all events and users.
AdminFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.ui.nav.AdminFragment
Default constructor for AdminFragment.
AppNavigator - Class in com.example.helios.ui
Helper class for handling navigation between top-level fragments and activities.
AppNavigator(AppCompatActivity, NavController) - Constructor for class com.example.helios.ui.AppNavigator
Constructs an AppNavigator.
ARG_EVENT_ID - Static variable in class com.example.helios.ui.event.EventDetailsBottomSheet
Argument key for the event ID.
ARG_HIDE_JOIN_BUTTON - Static variable in class com.example.helios.ui.event.EventDetailsBottomSheet
Argument key to specify if the join/leave button should be hidden.
AuthDeviceService - Class in com.example.helios.auth
Service class handling device authentication using Firebase Auth.
AuthDeviceService() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.auth.AuthDeviceService
Initializes the AuthDeviceService with a FirebaseAuth instance.

B

Bootstraps the current user's profile.

Constructs a new BootstrapResult.

C

CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.NotificationAudience
Notification addressed to cancelled or declined entrants.
CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.WaitingListStatus
The entrant has cancelled their participation or was removed.
clearInstallationId(Context) - Static method in class com.example.helios.auth.InstallationIdProvider
Clears the current installation ID from SharedPreferences.

completeCurrentProfile(Context, String, String, String, OnSuccessListener<UserProfile>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.service.ProfileService
Completes the current user's profile with personal details.

D

DECLINED - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.WaitingListStatus
The entrant has declined the invitation.
deleteCurrentProfile(Context, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.service.ProfileService
Deletes the profile of the current user.
deleteEvent(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.data.FirebaseRepository
Deletes an event from Firestore by its ID.
deleteEvent(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.service.EventService
Deletes an event by its unique identifier.
deleteProfile(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.service.ProfileService
Deletes a user profile by UID.
deleteUser(String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.data.FirebaseRepository
Deletes a user profile from Firestore by UID.
deleteWaitingListEntry(String, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.data.FirebaseRepository
Removes a user from an event's waiting list.

E

ensureSignedIn(OnSuccessListener<FirebaseUser>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.auth.AuthDeviceService
Ensures the user is signed in.
ensureSignedIn(OnSuccessListener<FirebaseUser>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.service.ProfileService
Ensures the user is signed in.
EntrantEventService - Class in com.example.helios.service
Service for entrant-side event participation actions such as joining, leaving, and querying the current user's waiting-list status.
EntrantEventService() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.service.EntrantEventService
 
Event - Class in com.example.helios.model
Represents an event that entrants may join through the lottery-based waiting list flow.
Event() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.model.Event
Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
Event(String, String, String, String, String, long, long, long, long, int, int, Integer, boolean, String, String, String, String, List<String>, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.helios.model.Event
Constructs a new Event with the specified details.
EventAdapter - Class in com.example.helios.ui
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events.
EventAdapter(List<Event>) - Constructor for class com.example.helios.ui.EventAdapter
Constructs an EventAdapter without a click listener.
EventAdapter(List<Event>, EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.helios.ui.EventAdapter
Constructs an EventAdapter with a click listener.
EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener - Interface in com.example.helios.ui
Listener interface for handling event click actions.
EventDetailsBottomSheet - Class in com.example.helios.ui.event
A bottom sheet dialog that displays the details of a specific event.
EventDetailsBottomSheet() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.ui.event.EventDetailsBottomSheet
Default constructor for EventDetailsBottomSheet.
EventService - Class in com.example.helios.service
Service class that provides business logic for managing events.

Initializes the EventService with a new FirebaseRepository instance.
EventsFragment - Class in com.example.helios.ui.nav
Fragment that displays a searchable and filterable list of all events.
EventsFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.ui.nav.EventsFragment
Default constructor for EventsFragment.
EXTRA_MODE - Static variable in class com.example.helios.ui.ProfileSetupActivity
Intent extra key to specify the operation mode (setup or edit).
EXTRA_RETURN_TO_MAIN - Static variable in class com.example.helios.ui.ProfileSetupActivity
Intent extra key to indicate if the activity should return to MainActivity after completion.

Updates an existing waiting list entry.

Updates an existing waiting list entry.

UserAdapter - Class in com.example.helios.ui
RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of users, typically for administrative purposes.

Constructs a UserAdapter.

Listener interface for handling user-related click events.

Represents a user profile in the Helios application.

W

WAITING - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.NotificationAudience
Notification addressed to entrants currently on the waiting list.
WAITING - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.WaitingListStatus
The entrant is currently waiting to be selected.
WaitingListEntry - Class in com.example.helios.model
Represents one entrant's state within a single event waiting list.
WaitingListEntry() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.model.WaitingListEntry
Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
WaitingListEntry(String, String, WaitingListStatus, long) - Constructor for class com.example.helios.model.WaitingListEntry
Constructs a new WaitingListEntry with the specified details.
WaitingListService - Class in com.example.helios.service
Service for organizer-side waiting-list retrieval, update, and removal actions.
WaitingListService() - Constructor for class com.example.helios.service.WaitingListService
Initializes the WaitingListService with a new FirebaseRepository instance.
WaitingListStatus - Enum in com.example.helios.model
Enumeration representing the possible statuses of an entrant in a waiting list.
